description: Trigger SDK regeneration for a specific package name with Yarn Berry (Yarn >= 2), with private registry authentication. arg0: full package name. arg1: scheme-less registry URL with trailing slash (e.g. '//npm.my-company.example/api/npm/npm/'). arg2: name of the environment variable holding the base64-encoded 'user:password' token (e.g. 'NPM_AUTH_BASE64'); must be exposed to Renovate via customEnvVariables.
